response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title "リモコン" (Remote Controller) and artist "じーさす" (G-Sus/Jesus-P) from the on-screen text at 02:33. Used a bilingual search query to confirm the original artist as じーざすP (Wonderful Opportunity!) and retrieved lyrics from VocaDB. The video is a performance by virtual characters Koseki Bijou and Robocosan.
response.global_summary: The video is a performance of the song "Remote Controller" (リモコン), featuring virtual characters Koseki Bijou and Robocosan, with dialogue intervals throughout the video and a final performance of the song.

scenes.description: The video starts with Koseki Bijou in a dark, arcade-themed environment with UI elements. There is dialogue, sound effects, and transitions featuring Robocosan appearing, with no vocal music until the song starts.
Koseki Bijou and Robocosan perform the song 'Remote Controller' (リモコン). Text credits for lyrics and music appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
L&R&B&S&T

[Verse 1]
これが私をリモコン操作（かんたん）コントロールする機械です
少しイビツな形をしておりますが使えますか？
説明書は紛失しておりますが使えますか？

[Chorus]
どうやってもうまく行かね
まだまだ、まだまだ足りない
回転（まわ）して、回転（まわ）して
どうやって踊りましょうか？
まだまだ、まだまだ踊り足りない
踊って、踊って

[Bridge]
あのコよりも上手く歌いたい
声を上げて、シンギング・ナウ

[Outro]
負けたくない
負けたくない
これが私をリモコン操作（かんたん）コントロールする機械です
説明書は紛失しておりますが使えますか？
負けたくない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro]
L&R&B&S&T

[Verse 1]
This is the remote controller that allows me to control you
It's a machine that's quite crooked, isn't it? But it's usable
The instruction manual has gone missing, but it's usable

[Chorus]
If I want to get out, I'll just use this
I'll just use this, I'll just use this
I'll turn it around
I'll turn it around
If I want to be able to dance, I'll just use this
I'll just use this, I'll just use this
I'll raise my voice
I'll raise my voice
If I want to sing better than that girl
I'll raise my voice, I'll raise my voice
I'll sing now
I'll sing now

[Bridge]
I will not lose!
I will not lose!

[Outro]
This is the remote controller that allows me to control you
The instruction manual is missing, but it's usable
I will not lose!
